Date: Mon Dec  2 08:03:05 2013
New Revision: 335457
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/335457

Log:
  - Support stage and Python3
  - Update WWW

  Submitted by:	lwhsu
  Approved by:	Hung-Yi Chen <gaod@hychen.org> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/py-babel/Makefile
  head/devel/py-babel/pkg-descr

Modified: head/devel/py-babel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-babel/Makefile	Mon Dec  2 08:02:31 2013	(r335456)
+++ head/devel/py-babel/Makefile	Mon Dec  2 08:03:05 2013	(r335457)
@@ -15,17 +15,17 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pytz
 
 USE_PYTHON=		2.7+
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
+PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 
 PORTDOCS=	docs/*
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 post-install:
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+	${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 .for docfile in ${PORTDOCS}
-	${CP} -r ${WRKSRC}/${docfile} ${DOCSDIR}
+	${CP} -r ${WRKSRC}/${docfile} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 .endfor
 .endif
